ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's college or university */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" TEXT /* Field goal percentage (in string format for percentage) */,
  "efficiency" INTEGER /* Efficiency rating of the player in the game */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots attempted */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts */,
  "free_throw_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the game */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player achieved a double-double */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player achieved a triple-double */,
  "player_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player's performance */,
  "injury_time" INTEGER /* Time spent on the bench due to injury */,
  "rest_time" INTEGER /* Time spent on the bench due to rest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds collected by the team */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of three-point shots attempted by the team */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Total number of three-point shots made by the team */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of free throw attempts by the team */,
  "free_throw_made" INTEGER /* Total number of free throws made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total number of steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total number of turnovers by the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of personal fouls by the team */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the team in the game */,
  "fast_break_points" INTEGER /* Points scored on fast breaks */,
  "bench_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the bench players */,
  "second_chance_points" INTEGER /* Points scored from second-chance opportunities */,
  "points_in_paint" INTEGER /* Points scored in the paint */,
  "points_off_turnovers" INTEGER /* Points scored from turnovers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the coach is affiliated with */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Coach's hometown */,
  "education" TEXT /* Coach's educational background */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "former_teams" TEXT /* List of teams the coach has previously coached */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements or awards of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Coach's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Coach's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., game summary, player performance, team analysis) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML, CSV) */,
  "report_length" INTEGER /* Length of the report in pages or words */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Summary of key findings from the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Analyst, Coach, Admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., coaching, analytics, management) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, inactive) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
